releases.title: 小鸽子做了个体检 · v0.5.1
highlights: 后台不打扰——你去写代码时，菜单栏小鸽子的呼吸自动安静下来，CPU 占用大幅降低
修复一处会在升级后悄悄弄丢历史信件的隐患
git 子进程出错时不再无声无息（留下诊断痕迹）
enHighlights: Stays out of your way — when you switch to coding, the menu-bar pigeon's breathing quiets down, sharply cutting background CPU
Fixed a flaw that could silently lose your saved letters after an upgrade
Git subprocess failures are no longer swallowed silently — they now leave a diagnostic trace
body: 亲爱的朋友，
这封很短。v0.5.1 没有新功能——是我带小鸽子去做了个体检。
它在后台待着的时候，呼吸一直没停下来，悄悄费着你的电。现在你一转头去写代码，它就安静地歇着；等你回来看它，再继续呼吸。
还顺手堵了两个看不见但要紧的洞：一个会在某些情况下，把你攒下的旧信悄悄弄丢；一个让 git 出错时连个响都没有。都补上了。
没有新邮票，也没有新功能。只是让它更稳一点、更省心一点地，陪着你。
——Pilo 邮局总局，于一次安静的体检日
enBody: Dear friend,
This one's short. v0.5.1 has no new features — I just took the little pigeon in for a checkup.
While it sat in the background, it kept breathing, quietly draining your battery. Now, the moment you turn to write code, it settles down and rests; when you come back to look, it breathes again.
I also sealed two invisible-but-important holes: one could, in certain cases, quietly lose the old letters you'd saved up; the other let git fail without making a sound. Both patched.
No new stamps, no new features. Just a little steadier, a little more carefree, keeping you company.
— Pilo General Post Office, on a quiet checkup day

releases.title: 邮局正式开门 · v0.5 通告
releases.enTitle: The Post Office is Open · v0.5 Release
highlights: 邮票本走到了屏幕边——菜单栏「邮票本召唤」打开，一枚小邮票浮在桌面边缘，拖到任意位置都记得住
点小邮票 → 常用邮票围成一圈展开。icon 在屏幕中央时是完整圆，贴边时朝屏幕内开半圆
右键邮票可「钉到首位 ✦」——加急邮戳，让最常用的 prompt 永远排在第一位
所有右键菜单换成了邮局风——cream paper + 金线 + 衬线字，告别系统蓝色高亮
项目文档行右键多了「复制路径」——跟邮票誊抄共享同一个邮戳音
enHighlights: The stamp book has moved to the screen edge — toggle it via the 'Summon Stamp Book' menu bar item. A tiny stamp will float at the edge of your screen, remembering its position.
Click the stamp → your most used stamps fan out in a circle. It forms a full circle in the center of the screen, or a semi-circle when docked at the edge.
Right-click a stamp to 'Pin to Top ✦' — an expedited postmark that keeps your most frequently used prompts first in line.
All context menus have been given the post office treatment — cream paper + gold lines + serif fonts, replacing the default system blue.
Project documents now have a 'Copy Path' option in their right-click menu — sharing the same wax seal sound as stamp copying.
body: 亲爱的朋友，
这是 Pilo 走出家门的第一天。
过去几个月，它是一只在 Emma 电脑里安静长大的小信鸽——白天帮她看仓库安全，傍晚 18:00 写一封工作总结。今天它第一次正式公开见人。
如果你是第一次认识 Pilo——它是一只常驻 macOS 菜单栏的 Git 仓库小伙伴。不调 LLM、不传代码、不上传任何东西，只用衬线宋体和金色细线，把「看见自己每天写了什么代码」这件事写成一封信。
v0.5 这一版做了三件事：把「邮票本」搬到屏幕边（菜单栏「邮票本召唤」即可），给最常用的 prompt 加了「钉到首位 ✦」加急邮戳，所有右键菜单换成了邮局风——告别系统蓝色高亮。
如果你用着不顺手、或者觉得 Pilo 应该长得不一样——欢迎来信。GitHub issue 或者 PR 都行。
慢慢攒，攒成你跟这些项目一起走过的路。
——Pilo 邮局总局，于 v0.5 开门日
enBody: Dear friend,
Today marks Pilo's first step out into the world.

For the past few months, it has been a quiet little carrier pigeon growing up in Emma's computer — watching over repository security by day, and writing a work summary at 6:00 PM. Today, it officially meets the public.

If this is your first time meeting Pilo — it's a Git repository companion that lives in your macOS menu bar. No LLM API calls, no code transmission, no uploads. Just serif fonts and delicate gold lines, turning the act of 'seeing what code you wrote today' into a daily letter.

Version 0.5 introduces three main updates: moving the 'stamp book' to the screen edge (via 'Summon Stamp Book' in the menu bar), adding an expedited 'Pin to Top ✦' feature for your favorite prompts, and redesigning all context menus with the post office aesthetic — bidding farewell to the system default blue highlights.
If something doesn't feel right, or if you think Pilo should look different — we welcome your letters. GitHub issues or PRs are both fine.
Take it slow, and let these letters accumulate into the journey you share with your projects.
— Pilo General Post Office, on v0.5 Opening Day

releases.title: AI 时代的小邮局 · v0.4 通告
releases.enTitle: A Small Post Office for the AI Era · v0.4 Release
highlights: 仓库里的 AI 工具配置自动盖邮戳 —— CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules / GEMINI.md / AGENTS.md / CONVENTIONS.md 都能识别
长文档左侧多了一份目录，⌘F 也能全文搜，上次读到哪开关之间自动记住
每个 doc 行尾多了「誊抄全文」按钮，预览页头也有
任意仓库有新 commit 想知道？设置 → 通用 → 「新邮件提醒」打开（opt-in，默认关）
「待寄出的小信」按时间排序，最近动过的在最前
所有 loading 都换成了金色波浪 dots，告别系统菊花
enHighlights: AI tool configurations in your repositories now get an automatic postmark — CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, and CONVENTIONS.md are all recognized.
Long documents now have a table of contents on the left, ⌘F full-text search, and it remembers where you left off reading.
Every document row now has a 'Copy Full Text' button, also available in the preview header.
Want to know when there are new commits in any repo? Enable 'New Mail Alert' in Settings -> General (opt-in, default off).
'Letters to send' are now sorted by time, with the most recently touched repos at the top.
All loading spinners have been replaced with golden wavy dots, retiring the system beachball.
body: 亲爱的朋友，
这是 Pilo 第一次给你寄「邮局通告」。以后每次有新版本，新闻都会从这个信箱送达——跟你每天傍晚收到的工作总结放在一起。
这一版 Pilo 把「在 AI 时代陪伴你写代码」这件事做实了：仓库里有 CLAUDE.md 的会自动盖一枚 Claude Code 邮戳，有 .cursorrules 的盖 Cursor 邮戳。一眼能看出哪些项目跟哪个 AI 在协作。
读你自己写的长文档（比如 IMPLEMENTATION.md）也舒服多了——左侧目录、⌘F 全文搜、上次读到哪自动记住。
如果你在某个仓库里 commit 了新东西，又怕 Pilo 错过——可以去设置里打开「新邮件提醒」。60 秒防扰窗口，连续 commit 不会刷屏。
慢慢攒，攒成你跟这些项目一起走过的路。
——Pilo 邮局总局
enBody: Dear friend,

This is the first 'Post Office Notice' Pilo is sending you. From now on, whenever there's a new version, the news will be delivered from this mailbox — alongside the work summaries you receive every evening.

This version of Pilo solidifies its role as 'your coding companion in the AI era': repositories with CLAUDE.md will automatically receive a Claude Code postmark, and those with .cursorrules will get a Cursor postmark. You can instantly see which projects are collaborating with which AI.
Reading your own long documents (like IMPLEMENTATION.md) is also much more comfortable now — left-side table of contents, ⌘F full-text search, and it automatically remembers where you last stopped.

If you committed something new in a repo but are worried Pilo might miss it — you can turn on 'New Mail Alert' in settings. There's a 60-second anti-disturbance window so continuous commits won't flood your screen.
Take it slow, and let these letters accumulate into the journey you share with your projects.
— Pilo General Post Office
